pages.home.hero.eyebrow: Ubuziranenge bwa generation iherutse ku Rwanda
pages.home.hero.headline: Gukura Rwanda imbere.
pages.home.hero.intro: Ubwikorezi. Ibiryo. Ibyoherezwe. Byubatswe ku bantu, byagizwe n'ubwenge bwa logistics n'ubunararibonye bw'ubuziranenge.
pages.home.hero.stats.one.label: Ubuziranenge bwa serivisi
pages.home.hero.stats.two.label: Gukora imodoka buri munsi
pages.home.hero.stats.three.label: Muri Kigali n'uturere tw'inzira
pages.home.highlights.title: Platform imwe ya ubwikorezi, ibiryo, ibyoherezwe n'ubwenge bwa abaguzi.
pages.home.glass.merchantText: Inyandiko zikorwa, ibisobanuro by'ibyagura, ubumenyi bw'umusaruro n'imenyereza y'ubwoko kuri abaguzi bakura.
pages.home.glass.driversText: Inyungu zihinduka, ubujyanama bwa profession na motocycles z'amashanyarazi kuri gari yanditse y'ubuziranenge.
pages.home.features.title: Yubatswe ku data, umutekano na serivisi zoroheje.
pages.home.features.dispatchText: Gukora inyoni mu gihe cy'ukuri kugira ngo buri mushinga n'ibyoherezwa biyongera kandi bihoroherwe.
pages.home.features.pricingText: Igiciro cy'urwego ruto kigira inama, umwanya, ubwikorezi n'agaciro k'umukiliya.
pages.home.features.merchantText: Ibikoresho byagufasha abaguzi gukurikirana imyitwarire, gucunga ibyagura no gukurura abakiliya.
pages.home.features.communityText: Ibikorwa by'igihano kuri abanyeshuri n'abatanga Umuganda bifasha Rwanda gukura hamwe.
pages.home.cta.title: Sisitemu y'ubwikorezi ya Rwanda iri hano hatangira.
pages.home.cta.text: Ubukungu, umutekano na serivisi z'ubunararibonye byubatswe kugira ngo bafashe abashyitsi, abaguzi n'ibyoherezwe binyuze mu kwizera.
pages.transport.hero.intro: Buri mushinga bwubatswe kuri umutekano, ubwenge n'ubwikorezi bw'umujyi wa none. Serivisi yacu ni ihitamo ry'ubunararibonye kuri Rwanda.
pages.transport.safety.title: Kugaragara, ubwenge n'ingufu z'amashanyarazi kuri buri mushinga.
pages.transport.safety.helmetText: Buri mushinga n'umutaha wose bahawe imihango yemewe kugira ngo bagire mushinga zihorane muri Kigali.
pages.transport.safety.rainText: Imyambaro y'imvura n'ibyumba byihagarara bimfasha abataha kuba batoze n'ihorane muri imvura yose.
pages.transport.safety.reflectiveText: Ibimenyetso by'igaragara n'imyambaro y'umutekano bongera umutekano mu mushinga z'umugoroba.
pages.transport.glass.electricText: Gari yacu ni ya none, ikora neza kandi yubatswe kugira ngo yongere umusaruro w'ibyoherezwe iyo ugiye utose abataha.
pages.transport.glass.passengerText: Buri mushinga bikorwa n'ubwenge bw'ibyumba, ubutumwa bw'urwego rwo hejuru na serivisi z'abakiliya.
pages.transport.student.title: Gufasha abanyeshuri kugira ngo bagire ubwikorezi bw'ihorane kuri kaminuza.
pages.transport.student.discountText: Abanyeshuri bagira igiciro cyo hasi kugira ngo bashobore guhingura hagati ya kaminuza, internship n'urugo.
pages.transport.student.studyText: Kugira ngo ubwikorezi ube ubuhashe, abanyeshuri bashobora gushyiramo igihe cyo gusoma.
pages.transport.student.youthText: Ibikorwa bifasha abana kugira ubumenyi, akazi n'ubufatanya bwo muryango.
pages.transport.cta.title: Igihano kuri abataha bahindura Rwanda.
pages.transport.cta.text: Abataha bari mu Umuganda bahembwa igihano kuri mushinga, bigatuma ubwikorezi buba igice cy'igiterane k'abanyarwanda.
pages.food.hero.intro: Ibiryo bwa restaurant, ibyagura n'ibikoresho buri munsi biherwa kuri vitesi, umutekano na serivisi z'ubunararibonye.
pages.food.hero.media: Ibiryo bishya n'ibyagura bifata ubwenge bwo kurugero.
pages.food.services.title: Restaurant, ibyagura n'ibyoherezwa by'ubunararibonye bwa kaminuza.
pages.food.services.restaurantText: Kuva kuri ibyamamare by'ahandi kuri restaurant y'ubunararibonye, ibiryo byawe bishya, byihuta kandi byahindurwa neza.
pages.food.services.groceryText: Ibirimo by'ahandi, ibyagura by'urugo n'ibikoresho by'urugo biriho iyo ukeneye cyane.
pages.food.services.buyText: Ubuze igihe cyo kugura? Itsinda ryacu gikura, gura n'ikohereza ibintu kuri wewe, bifite kwizera.
pages.food.glass.workText: Ibiryo by'akazi n'inyungu zihora ku gihe cy'uburyo bw'ubunararibonye n'ukurikirana buri gihe.
pages.food.glass.homeText: Ibyagura n'ibikoresho biherwa neza kugira ngo umuryango ukore ku munsi.
pages.food.support.title: Yubatswe kuri ubuzima bwihuse, umwanya wihuse n'ibyifuzo by'umujyi wa none.
pages.food.support.fastText: Gukora ubutumwa mu gihe cy'ukuri n'aboherezwa bahuguwe kugira ngo ibyoherezwa bihore ku gihe.
pages.food.support.secureText: Guhindura neza n'ibyoherezwa by'umutekano bira kubungabunga buri ubutumwa kuva kuri guhura kuri umuryango.
pages.food.support.smartText: Serivisi k'abakiliya n'ukugaragara bira kugira ngo buri ubutumwa bujye ku bubiko kuva ku ntangiriro kugeza ku impera.
pages.food.cta.title: Tangira ibiryo, ibyagura n'ibikoresho binyuze mu burenganzira bwo guhoherezwa.
pages.food.cta.text: Buri ubutumwa bukorwa n'abataha bahuguwe, kuva kuri kuriya kugeza k'umukiliya.
pages.courier.hero.intro: Guhoherezwa ibyanditswe, ibyagurisha n'ibintu by'umuntu wawe, bifite uburyo bw'umutekano n'ibikorwa by'umunsi umwe.
pages.courier.hero.media: Guhindura neza, abataha bahuguwe n'ukugaragara kuva ku ntangiriro kugeza ku impera.
pages.courier.services.title: Guhoherezwa ibyanditswe, ibyagurisha n'ibintu by'umuntu wawe byose bikorwa neza.
pages.courier.services.docText: Ibyanditswe byihuse biherwa neza ku biro, kaminuza n'abafatanya muri Kigali.
pages.courier.services.businessText: Gukora neza inyandiko, ibyagurisha by'ahandi n'ibyoherezwa by'ubucuruzi.
pages.courier.services.personalText: Guhindura neza ibintu by'abanyamurikire, ibikoresho n'ibintu by'umutekano.
pages.courier.glass.sameDayText: Hitamo vitesi y'ubunararibonye kuri ibyoherezwa by'igihe cy'ihuse, bifite inama kuva kuri guhura kugeza ku guhoherezwa.
pages.courier.glass.trackingText: Kugaragara mu gihe cy'ukuri bifasha gukurikirana iterambere, naho guhindura neza bira kubungabunga buri kimwe.
pages.courier.professional.title: Abataha bahuguwe, uburyo bw'umutekano n'uburinzi bw'ibintu buri kigero.
pages.courier.professional.protectionTex: Yubatswe kuri ibintu by'umutekano, ibintu by'agaciro n'ibyifuzo by'ubucuruzi.
pages.courier.professional.trainingText: Itsinda rya aboherezwa rihuguwa serivisi, umutekano n'ubujyanama bwo guhoherezwa mbere ya buri nzira.
pages.courier.professional.workflowText: Gukora ubutumwa, guhura, gukora n'amakuru y'ibyoherezwa bira kugira ngo buri kimwe kibe uburyo bw'ukuri.
pages.courier.cta.title: Guhindura ibyanditswe n'ibintu binyuze mu serivisi z'ibyoherezwa ifite imiterere y'ubunararibonye, by'ukuri n'umutekano.
pages.contact.hero.headline: Twandikira Urumuri
pages.contact.hero.intro: Twandikira itsinda ryacu kuri ubufatanya, gufasha, ubutumwa bwa mushoferi n'ubufatanya bwa abaguzi.
pages.contact.hero.media: Ibikoresho by'ubunararibonye byo guhuzagurira abaguzi, abashoferi n'abakiliya.
pages.contact.reach.title: Ibisabwa by'ubucuruzi, gufasha cyangwa ubutumwa bwa mushoferi... turi hano kugufasha.
pages.contact.reach.businessText: Fata neza na Urumuri kuri serivisi z'abaguzi, ikwirakwira n'ubufatanya bwa logistics.
pages.contact.reach.driverText: Tanga ubutumwa kugira ngo winjire mu gari yacu cyangwa ubaze ku bujyanama bwa mushinga n'ibikoresho.
pages.contact.reach.customerText: Fasha ku ubutumwa, ibyoherezwa n'ibibazo by'urwego rwo hejuru.
pages.contact.reach.pressText: Twandikira Urumuri kuri amakuru n'ubufatanya bwa itangazamakuru.
pages.contact.cta.title: Dufate iyo Rwanda ikura mu bijyanye n'ubwikorezi bw'ubwenge.
